tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Public Design Workshop

payload.title: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard (Q52/53) Public Design Workshop
payload.description: Public Design Workshop for the Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/53 Select Bus Service project, held in Broad Channel and the Rockaways

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/53 Select Bus Service
payload.description: Transform Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards into a complete street with Select Bus Service, bus lanes, median stations, and pedestrian safety improvements
Q52 Limited operates between Elmhurst & Arverne

payload.limits: 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways
payload.description: Based on the Q52/53 LTD bus route, 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways
Segment of the SBS corridor with main road bus lanes and median stations, typical 120-foot right-of-way
Segment of the SBS corridor with offset bus lanes, SBS buses stop at bus bulbs, local buses stop at the curb

payload.agency_name: New York City Department of Design and Construction

payload.description: Community Advisory Committee for the Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS project

tool_args.label: Main road bus lanes - Woodhaven Boulevard

payload.description: Main road bus lanes on Woodhaven Boulevard; all buses use median stations. Left-turn bays at selected locations. Slip lanes at select locations allow vehicles to move between service road and main road.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lanes - Cross Bay Boulevard

payload.description: Offset bus lanes on Cross Bay Boulevard. SBS buses stop at bus bulbs; local/express buses stop at the curb. Maintains parking/deliveries at the curb.
High-quality median bus stations for all buses (SBS, Local, and Express) on Woodhaven Boulevard. Medians shorten pedestrian crossing distances, provide refuges, and add greenery.

tool_args.label: Bus bulb stations - Cross Bay Boulevard

payload.description: SBS buses stop at bus bulbs; local/express buses stop at the curb. Sidewalk is extended to meet the bus lane. SBS buses can pass local and express buses.
Off-board fare collection with fare machines at every SBS stop. Pay with Metrocard or coins. Customers can board at any door.
Over 6 miles of bus lanes. Opportunity to explore unique treatments including physical separation (hard barriers, soft barriers like rumble strips) and bus lane materials.

tool_args.label: Public Design Workshop - Broad Channel / Rockaways

payload.description: Public Design Workshop in Broad Channel and the Rockaways to review proposed corridor designs and SBS bus stops for Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/53 SBS

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.claim_text: Vision Zero Priority Corridor Since 2009 on Woodhaven & Cross Bay Blvds
payload.subject: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor

tool_args.label: Concept 2: Main Road Bus Lanes chosen as preferred

payload.claim_text: Concept 2 Main Road Bus Lanes chosen as preferred corridor design. Substantial transit improvement. Most potential for pedestrian and safety improvements. Balances local vehicle access and thru vehicle traffic.
payload.subject: Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor design

payload.claim_text: Q52 extension is under consideration. MTA Bus is currently studying community requests to extend the Q52 further east in the Rockaway Peninsula.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: SBS changes from Q52/Q53 LTD route

payload.claim_text: The SBS will use the viaduct over Atlantic Av (local bus will use service roads to access Atlantic Av). SBS stops at 91 Av instead of Atlantic Av. New stop at 101 Av. New stop at Pitkin Av. Broad Channel and Rockaway stops to be discussed at workshop.

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
